title: Python Developer - Pan India
jobDescription:
Company: PwC India

Department: Advisory

Job Type: Full-Time


About PwC India:

PwC India leverages technology to transform businesses. We are looking for a Python Developer to join our team, focusing on building robust, scalable solutions that drive business outcomes.


Role Overview:

The Python Developer will lead the design and development of Python-based solutions for processing structured and unstructured data and streamlining business workflows. This role emphasizes expertise and best practices in development, deployment, and operational efficiency.

Key Responsibilities:

  • Lead end-to-end development of Python applications, scripts and pipelines focusing on data extraction, transformation and large-scale processing frameworks
  • Build scalable Python solutions using libraries such as Pandas for data manipulation
  • Implement best practices in CI/CD and Git workflows for reliable deployment and continuous improvement.
  • Write efficient SQL queries for data extraction tasks.
  • Develop and deploy solutions on Linux environments (Ubuntu, RHEL).
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to align technical solutions with business outcomes.

Required Qualifications and Skills:

  • Education: Bachelors or Masters in Computer Science, Data Science, AI, or related fields.
  • Experience: 4+ years in Python development

Technical Skills:

  • Proficiency in Python and libraries such as Pandas.
  • Strong SQL skills.
  • Experience with CI/CD and Git workflows.
  • Knowledge of RESTful APIs, JSON, and data serialization.
  • Experience with Linux eg: Ubuntu, RHEL (good to have)

Soft Skills:

  • Excellent communication and problem-solving skills.
  • Proactive and eager to adopt new technologies.

Preferred Qualifications:

  • Experience with AI/ML technologies
  • Familiarity with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, Google Cloud)
  • Experience with containerization (Docker/Kubernetes).

title: Python Software Developer
jobDescription:
Your role:

Join our newly formed Investor Relations Technology team and help build the foundational data infrastructure that powers investor engagement across the entire firm. As a Software Engineer focused on data stores and integrations, you will develop and maintain a centralized, company-wide repository for Investor Relations data.

You will be responsible for creating the critical "integration points" that allow various internal applications and teams to seamlessly access and update investor information. This role sits at the heart of our data strategy, ensuring that high-quality investor data is secure, scalable, and readily available across our global ecosystem.


Your responsibilities:

  • Design, develop, and Build high-performance, secure RESTful APIs that serve as the primary interface for applications to interact with the Investor Relations data store.
  • Design, implement, and optimize both Relational (SQL) and Non-Relational (NoSQL) data structures to handle complex investor data at scale
  • Write clean, scalable code using Python for backend services and React for front-end user interfaces.
  • Write clean, scalable Python code to handle data ingestion, transformation, and synchronization across multiple internal platforms .
  • Work across teams to integrate the Investor Relations data store with diverse downstream applications and third-party tools
  • Implement robust validation, monitoring, and alerting mechanisms to ensure the accuracy and availability of investor data .
  • Participate in requirements analysis and translate business needs into technical designs, contributing to a high-quality codebase through peer reviews and automated testing .
  • Support training initiatives and user adoption across global teams.

Your profile

Required Skills & Experience:

  • BSc/B.E/B.Tech in Computer Science, Engineering, or related field.
  • 3+ years of experience in software engineering with focus on financial systems, payments, or treasury technology.
  • Strong professional experience with Python programming language for backend services and data processing.
  • Experience building secured RESTful APIs for financial services with high performance and security requirements.
  • Strong understanding of software architecture, design patterns, and microservices.
  • Experience with SQL and database management for financial data.
  • Knowledge of secure SDLC principles and best practices for financial applications.
  • Familiarity with React or modern JavaScript frameworks for front-end development.
  • Familiarity with Docker containerization and Kubernetes orchestration.
  • Experience in cloud deployment on AWS.
  • Understanding of infrastructure monitoring, alerting, and incident response.
  • Understanding of test automation frameworks and practices

About the Role
We are looking for a skilled Python Developer with 3 to5 years of hands-on experience in building scalable applications, APIs, automation scripts, and backend services. The ideal candidate should have strong problemsolving skills and the ability to work in an agile, fast-paced environment.

Key Responsibilities

  • Troubleshoot, debug, and improve performance of existing applications.

Education

Good to Have Skill Requirements:

title: Full Stack .Net Developer
jobDescription:
Your potential, unleashed.

Indias impact on the global economy has increased at an exponential rate and Deloitte presents an opportunity to unleash and realize your potential amongst cutting edge leaders, and organisations shaping the future of the region, and indeed, the world beyond.

At Deloitte, your whole self to work, every day. Combine that with our drive to propel with purpose and you have the perfect playground to collaborate, innovate, grow, and make an impact that matters.


The team

The Enabling Area – Information Technology team is responsible for building & maintaining different applications for Deloitte South Asia that focuses on providing employee experience.


Your work profile.

As an Assistant Manager in our IT Team, you’ll build and nurture positive working relationships with teams and clients with the intention to exceed client expectations: -


Primary purpose of the role:

Tech Stack Requirements:

  • Frontend: React.js Or Nest.js or Express.js or TypeScript
  • Backend: .NET/.NET Core using C# or Node.js
  • Database: SQL Server
  • Good to Have: Azure Cloud, Node.js/ Python / AI / ML exposure

What he/she’ll Do:

  • Build and maintain scalable web applications & APIs
  • Work across frontend + backend + database
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams in Agile setup
  • (Optional) Contribute to AI/ML-powered feature development

What We’re Looking For:

  • Strong ownership and problem-solving skills
  • Ability to lead modules or mentor juniors
  • Passion for continuous learning & innovation

Desired qualifications:

Bachelor’s degree


Location and way of working

Base location: Delhi


Your role as an Assistant Manager

We expect our people to embrace and live our purpose by challenging themselves to identify issues that are most important for our clients, our people, and for society.

In addition to living our purpose, Senior Executive across our organization must strive to be:

  • Inspiring - Leading with integrity to build inclusion and motivation
  • Committed to creating purpose - Creating a sense of vision and purpose
  • Agile - Achieving high-quality results through collaboration and Team unity
  • Skilled at building diverse capability - Developing diverse capabilities for the future
  • Persuasive / Influencing - Persuading and influencing stakeholders
  • Collaborating - Partnering to build new solutions
  • Delivering value - Showing commercial acumen
  • Committed to expanding business - Leveraging new business opportunities
  • Analytical Acumen - Leveraging data to recommend impactful approach and solutions through the power of analysis and visualization
  • Effective communication – Must be well abled to have well-structured and well-articulated conversations to achieve win-win possibilities
  • Engagement Management / Delivery Excellence - Effectively managing engagement(s) to ensure timely and proactive execution as well as course correction for the success of engagement(s)
  • Managing change - Responding to changing environment with resilience
  • Managing Quality & Risk - Delivering high quality results and mitigating risks with utmost integrity and precision
  • Strategic Thinking & Problem Solving - Applying strategic mindset to solve business issues and complex problems
  • Tech Savvy - Leveraging ethical technology practices to deliver high impact for clients and for Deloitte
  • Empathetic leadership and inclusivity - creating a safe and thriving environment where everyone's valued for who they are, use empathy to understand others to adapt our behaviours and attitudes to become more inclusive.

How you’ll grow

Connect for impact

Our exceptional team of professionals across the globe are solving some of the world’s most complex business problems, as well as directly supporting our communities, the planet, and each other. Know more in our Global Impact Report and our India Impact Report.


Empower to lead

You can be a leader irrespective of your career level. Our colleagues are characterized by their ability to inspire, support, and provide opportunities for people to deliver their best and grow both as professionals and human beings. Know more about Deloitte and our One Young World partnership.


Inclusion for all

At Deloitte, people are valued and respected for who they are and are trusted to add value to their clients, teams and communities in a way that reflects their own unique capabilities. Know more about everyday steps that you can take to be more inclusive. At Deloitte, we believe in the unique skills, attitude and potential each and every one of us brings to the table to make an impact that matters.


Drive your career

At Deloitte, you are encouraged to take ownership of your career. We recognize there is no one size fits all career path, and global, cross-business mobility and up / re-skilling are all within the range of possibilities to shape a unique and fulfilling career. Know more about Life at Deloitte.


Everyone’s welcome entrust your happiness to us

Our workspaces and initiatives are geared towards your 360-degree happiness. This includes specific needs you may have in terms of accessibility, flexibility, safety and security, and caregiving. Here’s a glimpse of things that are in store for you.


Interview tips

We want job seekers exploring opportunities at Deloitte to feel prepared, confident, and comfortable. To help you with your interview, we suggest that you do your research, know some background about the organization and the business area you’re applying to. Check out recruiting tips from Deloitte professionals.

title: Software Developer
jobDescription:
We are looking for a  Member of Technical Staff to join our Printing/Faxing team within our Platform & Data services subdivision, Integration Platform zone.

Our zone vision is to maximize our network effect through efficient, effective, experience driven interoperability and navigate towards value-based care. Our teams vision is to improve the collaboration in healthcare ecosystem for value-based care and better patient experience. We are building a robust and scalable integration platform to enable bidirectional workflow between athenahealth and external system to exchange data. The data exchange usually takes place in the form of messages” and different other types too via variety of ways through the network, which is achieved by our team.

But enough about us, let’s talk about you. Your job will be to build enterprise quality applications/services hosted on cloud, with a focus on complex integration and stability at platform solutions. You are a technologist with zeal to solve complex problems, have a growth mindset, are a fast learner, who is willing to work in fast paced environment, help us reach our goal of becoming the healthcare backbone by enhancing our cloud based EHR solution and leveraging the network effect of 100k+ providers. Apply your technical skills towards allowing doctors to be doctors so that they can spend more time doing what they do best: provide patient care.

Job responsibilities:

  • Design and develop quality code in an agile approach adhering to the business requirements. Deploy the code to production and deliver timely fixes.
  • Write unit tests, continuously monitor, and maintain code quality by checking potential code bugs and vulnerabilities.
  • Build services that run on cloud and cater to billions of transaction volumes, per day.
  • Ensuring high quality and optimum performance of integration systems by proactively identifying and proposing new, alternative solutions as appropriate.
  • Understand and follow coding conventions, architectural approaches, and best practices.
  • Adhere to the team’s Definition of Done; perform peer code reviews to ensure quality standards.
  • Develop domain knowledge. Take ownership of what you build and coordinate your efforts across the teams to ensure proper completion.
  • Participate and contribute to Agile ceremonies including daily stand-up, sprint planning, readouts, and retrospectives.

Education, Experience, & Skills Required:

  • 2+ years of experience in software development role
  • Experience in an Agile environment preferred.
  • Bachelor’s Degree or equivalent
  • Significant software engineering skills (SDLC) with high quality and DevSecOps driven delivery.
  • Knowledge and expertise in programming languages such as: Java, Perl, NodeJS, React JS, OOPS
  • Knowledge of working with AWS, IaC (Terraform) and Snowflake.
  • Strong knowledge in SQL development.

Behaviors & Abilities Required:

  • Ability to learn and adapt in a fast-paced environment, while producing quality code
  • Ability to work collaboratively on a cross-functional team with a wide range of experience levels.
  • Ability to write code that is technically sound, performant, scalable, and readable.
  • Ability to collaborate with business owners to understand and refine business requirements.
  • Ability and willingness to demonstrate ownership of an area of Athena's technology.

title: Gen AI Developer
tagsAndSkills: Agentic Ai,Machine Learning,Python,Artificial Intelligence,Natural Language Processing,Chatbot,Al,Retrieval Augmented Generation
jobDescription:
Location: Gurgaon (Hybrid)
Employment Type: Full-Time


Job Summary:


We are seeking a skilled GenAI Developer with 3-4 years of experience to join our innovative team. The ideal candidate will have hands-on experience building and deploying generative AI solutions, with expertise in modern AI frameworks and agent orchestration systems.


AI Solution Development

  • Design and implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems for enterprise applications
  • Develop intent classification models for natural language understanding
  • Build entity extraction pipelines for structured data processing
  • Create and optimize voice agents for conversational AI applications
  • Implement AI agent orchestration frameworks for complex multi-agent workflows

Technical Implementation

  • Develop high-performance APIs using FastAPI in Python for AI service deployment
  • Implement real-time communication systems using WebSockets for interactive AI applications
  • Build scalable microservices architecture for AI model serving
  • Integrate various AI models and services into production-ready applications
  • Optimize model performance and latency for real-time applications

AI Agent Development

  • Design and implement autonomous AI agents with decision-making capabilities
  • Build agent orchestration frameworks for coordinating multiple AI agents
  • Develop agent communication protocols and workflow management systems
  • Create agent monitoring and debugging tools
  • Implement agent safety and reliability measures

System Integration & Deployment

  • Deploy AI models in cloud environments with proper scalability considerations
  • Implement CI/CD pipelines for AI model versioning and deployment
  • Monitor and maintain AI systems in production environments
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate AI solutions into existing products

Required Qualifications

Experience & Background


  • 3-4 years of hands-on experience in AI/ML development
  • Proven track record of building and deploying generative AI applications
  • Experience with production-level AI system implementation .

Technical Skills


  • Generative AI Expertise: Hands-on experience with RAG systems, intent classification, and entity extraction
  • Voice AI: Experience developing voice agents and conversational AI systems
  • Python Development: Proficiency in Python with strong experience in FastAPI framework
  • Real-time Communication: Solid understanding and implementation experience with WebSockets
  • AI Agents: Experience building AI agents and working with agent orchestration frameworks
  • Machine Learning: Understanding of ML fundamentals, model training, and optimization
  • APIs & Microservices: Experience designing and implementing RESTful APIs and microservices architecture

Preferred Qualifications


  • Experience with popular AI frameworks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, Transformers)
  • Knowledge of vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Chroma)
  • Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, GCP, Azure) for AI deployment
  • Familiarity with containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes)
  • Understanding of prompt engineering and fine-tuning techniques
  • Experience with speech-to-text and text-to-speech technologies
  • Knowledge of agent frameworks (CrewAI, AutoGen, LangGraph)

Technical Requirements

Programming Languages

  • Python (Advanced level required)
  • JavaScript (for WebSocket implementations)
  • MongoDB for data manipulation

AI/ML Technologies

  • Large Language Models (GPT, Claude, Llama, etc.)
  • Embedding models and vector similarity search
  • Natural Language Processing libraries
  • Speech processing frameworks

Development Tools

  • Git version control
  • API testing tools (Postman, curl)
  • Monitoring and logging systems
  • Development environments and IDEs

title: Full Stack Developer
tagsAndSkills: full stack developer,rest,python,software development,react,user stories,cybersecurity,change management
jobDescription:
Your role and responsibilities

In this role, you will have the opportunity to contribute significantly to successful project results in technology, software, product, and/or solution development, as well as associated Intellectual Property (IP). Each day, you will act as the first point of contact in Research and Development for specific product-related issues and maintenance. You will also showcase your expertise by identifying, proposing, and implementing innovative solutions.

This role is contributing to the Motion Business High Power Division in Bangalore, India

You will be mainly accountable for:

  • Collaborating with product owners and business units to understand business requirements and user stories.
  • Developing applications based on design and architecture specifications.
  • Delivering high-quality, well-tested code aligned with coding standards and product specifications.
  • Participating in requirements management, elicitation, software configuration, and change management.
  • Applying Agile and DevOps practices throughout the development lifecycle.
  • Demonstrating strong knowledge of web and cloud platforms, relevant technologies, and object-oriented programming languages.

Qualifications for the role:

  • B.E/B.Tech in Computer Science, Electronics, or related field with 58 years of experience in software development.
  • Must have strong experience with REST APIs, Python & React.js (executed at least 23 projects).
  • Proficiency in object-oriented programming concepts, data structures, and databases.
  • Experience with Docker containers and Python (core syntax, scripting, modules, packages, file I/O, JSON handling).
  • Understanding of software development methodologies: Requirements Management, Agile Process, Configuration & Change Management.
  • Familiarity with DevOps principles and practices.
  • Knowledge on micro-service design patterns and container orchestration is a plus.
  • It is good to have some understanding on cybersecurity fundamentals.

title: Fullstack Software Developer
jobDescription:
Job Description


We are looking for a Full Stack Software Development Engineer (SDE) to build modern, scalable web applications and APIs. The ideal candidate should have strong experience in JavaScript/TypeScript, React.js, Next.js, and Node.js, along with exposure to cloud platforms and modern AI-assisted development practices.

This role involves working on product-driven engineering teams, building scalable SaaS applications, and leveraging AI-powered development tools to enhance productivity.


Roles & Responsibilities


  • Develop modern web applications using React.js and Next.js
  • Build scalable backend services using Node.js and Express.js
  • Design and develop RESTful APIs and microservices
  • Work with SQL and NoSQL databases such as PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB
  • Design efficient database schemas and optimize queries
  • Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms (AWS / Azure / GCP)
  • Implement CI/CD pipelines and containerized deployments using Docker
  • Use AI-assisted development tools (GitHub Copilot, Cursor, ChatGPT) to improve development productivity
  • Write clean, maintainable, and scalable code
  • Participate in Agile/Scrum development cycles
  • Write unit tests and integration tests
  • Collaborate with cross-functional product and engineering teams

Preferred / Good to Have


  • Experience with LLM integrations and AI-powered applications
  • Familiarity with vector databases and prompt engineering
  • Experience integrating OpenAI / Azure OpenAI APIs
  • Experience working on SaaS platforms
  • Experience integrating third-party APIs
  • Exposure to data platforms or analytics products

Desired Candidate Profile


  • Strong proficiency in JavaScript / TypeScript
  • Hands-on experience with React.js and Next.js
  • Backend development experience using Node.js and Express.js
  • Strong understanding of API design and microservices architecture
  • Experience working with SQL and NoSQL databases
  • Exposure to cloud platforms and DevOps practices
  • Strong problem-solving and analytical skills
  • Ability to work in fast-paced product engineering environments

Education


B.E / B.Tech / M.Tech in Computer Science, Information Technology, or related field.
